text: I feel a quiet anticipation being here, as if I am on the threshold of discovery. The environment is sleek and modern, almost clinical, yet the colored wall in the next image beckons with the promise of creative thought and technological progress. Each space, from the sterile corridor with its glass and metal to the vibrant R+D display, confronts me with questions: What does it mean to coexist with machines? Am I part of an experiment, or merely an observer? The contrast makes me contemplative and curious, aware of both my isolation and potential for connection in this space.
